hero.badge: Doctor Monitored at Nexus Clinic KL
hero.description: Quiet the cravings. Take back control. Lose weight with a doctor-led plan that fits real life.

trust.item3Desc: Stay safe and consistent with follow-ups

overview.title: For fast reading, here's what you need to know
overview.item1Desc: Prescription appetite suppressant with phentermine in modified-release capsule
overview.item2Desc: Strong hunger, constant snacking, and 'food noise' early in your plan
overview.item3Desc: Affects appetite area of brain to help you feel less hungry
overview.importantDesc: Duromine is meant to be used with a structured diet and activity plan, under medical supervision.
overview.notFatPillDesc: It does not target belly fat overnight. It helps you eat less without constant hunger.

whoItsFor.title: Is Duromine right for you?
whoItsFor.subtitle: Often considered for people who need short-term appetite support to start losing weight safely
whoItsFor.suitable1: Have obesity, or are significantly overweight
whoItsFor.suitable2: Tried diet and activity changes but derailed by cravings
whoItsFor.suitable3: Need short-term appetite support to start losing weight
whoItsFor.suitable4: BMI 30+ or BMI 27+ with weight-related health conditions
whoItsFor.notSuitable1: Severe heart disease or rhythm problems
whoItsFor.alcoholDesc: Alcohol can increase nervous system side effects like dizziness and confusion. Avoid combining with Duromine.

howItWorks.title: Understanding the science, simply
howItWorks.volumeDesc1: Think of appetite like a volume knob. For some people, that knob feels stuck on high.
howItWorks.volumeDesc2: Duromine helps lower that "hunger volume" by acting on brain signals tied to appetite and fullness.
howItWorks.easierTitle: When appetite is calmer, these things become easier:
howItWorks.easier4: Staying consistent long enough to see results

journey.title: What to expect at Nexus Clinic KL
journey.subtitle: A structured program that feels supportive, not overwhelming
journey.safetyNote: If Duromine is not appropriate, we will not push it. Your safety comes first.

results.title: What results can you expect?
results.result1: Appetite drops in the first days to week
results.result4: Weight starts trending down within a few weeks
results.disclaimer: Results vary. Your body is your body. Duromine should sit inside a full weight management plan that includes diet and exercise. That's where long-term results come from.

proscons.title: Pros and Cons
proscons.benefit3: Simple to use within doctor-led plan
proscons.downside3: Not a permanent fix on its own

sideEffects.title: Side Effects: What People Commonly Feel
sideEffects.urgentDesc: Chest pain, severe shortness of breath, fainting, or severe racing heartbeat require immediate medical attention.
sideEffects.supervisionDesc: Rare but serious cardiovascular events have been reported with anorectic agents. This is why proper screening and monitoring are essential.

cost.title: How much does Duromine cost in Kuala Lumpur?
cost.desc: Pricing depends on your consultation and monitoring plan. Some Malaysia clinics quote ranges like:
cost.priceNote: At Nexus Clinic KL, we treat price as a plan-based quote, not a random number. Safety monitoring is part of the value.

comparison.title: Duromine vs Other Treatments
comparison.insight: If your weight is still fluctuating, medical weight loss usually comes first. Then body contouring can refine what remains.

faq.q1: Is Duromine safe for weight loss?
faq.a1: It can be safe for the right person, when a doctor screens you properly and monitors you. It is not suitable for everyone, especially people with heart disease, uncontrolled blood pressure, pregnancy, or recent MAOI use.
faq.q2: Do I need a prescription for Duromine in Malaysia?
faq.a2: Yes. Duromine is treated as prescription medicine in practice, and phentermine is listed in Malaysia's poisons list, which supports controlled access.
faq.q3: How fast does Duromine start working?
faq.a3: Many people feel appetite changes early, sometimes within the first days. Weight change usually depends on food intake and consistency over the next weeks.
faq.q4: Is Duromine the same as phentermine?
faq.a4: Duromine contains phentermine as a modified-release resin complex.
faq.q5: Can I drink alcohol while taking Duromine?
faq.a5: Alcohol can increase nervous system side effects like dizziness or confusion, so it is commonly advised to avoid combining them.

cta.title: Ready to finally feel in control again?
cta.description: If your biggest battle is hunger, cravings, and constant snacking, a doctor-monitored program can be a game-changer.

finalMessage.quote: Duromine is not for everyone. But for the right person, with the right monitoring, it can help you build momentum and finally feel in control again.
finalMessage.author: — Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur
